infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Portl uses your location to suggest the nearest gate, tag complaint spots, and alert you when you're near home.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Portl uses contacts so you can pick guests and staff without typing.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Portl adds amenity bookings to your calendar.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsFullAccessUsageDescription: Portl adds amenity bookings to your calendar.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Portl can speak Ask Portl replies aloud.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Portl to access your camera to scan passes and take visitor photos.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Allow Portl to use Face ID to unlock the app quickly and securely.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Portl to use your location for nearest gate, near-home alerts, and complaint tagging.

plugins.contactsPermission: Allow Portl to access contacts to pre-approve guests and add staff.

plugins.calendarPermission: Allow Portl to add amenity bookings to your calendar.
